rows.label: qev030609_MSG0005
rows.name:
Cough... Nemard rushed out saying he was
going to make a horn ring, but what kind of
girl is he planning to marry, I wonder? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030609_MSG0004
rows.name:
I hope it's a girl who can
firmly support that unreliable
boy, but... Cough, cough... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030609_MSG0002
rows.name:
To think that spoiled Nemard is
getting married. Living a long
life has its rewards, da. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030609_MSG0003
rows.name:
Ho ho, getting to drink such delicious
booze, da. Whenever my time comes now...
Cough... I'll be satisfied, da. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030609_MSG1001
rows.name:
Cough... Cough... I hear you
had a bout with Galba. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030609_MSG1002
rows.name:
Back when I was chieftain, he and
I cut down those Cavern Clan
bastards one after another, da. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030609_MSG1003
rows.name:
Ho ho... Both he and I have grown old, da...
Now all that's left is to leave things to the
likes of Nemard and Bazis and drop dead, da. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030609_MSG1004
rows.name:
...I'm truly glad to have been able to spend such
a fun time at the end, zo. Cough... I have no
lingering attachments or regrets left in this world. [ST:wait ]
